name: bridge-engine
description: The Bridge — real engine (deterministic data pipeline). Phases 0-2: synthetic fixtures, invariant core, and the transmission (classify/size/route + night-ER block). No AI in any path. Separate repo from the public demo; the money math is the shared single-source package in src/money.

scripts.test: node test/harness.ts && node test/transmission.harness.ts && node test/series.harness.ts && node test/curve.harness.ts && node test/workflow.harness.ts && node test/site.harness.ts && node test/fall.harness.ts && node test/twonumbers.harness.ts
